how_it_works_steps.title: Order on WhatsApp
how_it_works_steps.body: Message us your catch. We confirm availability and price in minutes.

how_it_works_steps.title: Packed fresh
how_it_works_steps.body: Your fish is cleaned, portioned, and packed in insulated cold-chain boxes.

how_it_works_steps.title: Delivered same day
how_it_works_steps.body: Morning or afternoon slot. Cape Town delivery, tracked and confirmed.

whatsapp_cta.heading: Order in 60 seconds.
whatsapp_cta.body: Message us, tell us what you want, and we handle the rest. Ask about this week's fresh fish, or order chicken and frozen seafood anytime.

quality_promise.heading: Quality food, delivered.
quality_promise.body: Fresh fish sourced weekly from Cape Town waters — yellowfin tuna, hake, kingklip, and more. Our pasture-raised chicken is GMO-free, with no growth hormones, no routine antibiotics, and no brine.
bullets: All items sold by weight — what you order is what you pay for
